text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
An important day for Umadols to express their
gratitude to their fans.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh!
Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, everyone! ☆ Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Falco's Super Pure ♪ Valentine's
Day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm holding this mini performance to celebrate
this lovely day with all of you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And afterwards, I brought something you've all
been waiting for—chocolates! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yesss! That means I'll get at least one chocolate
this year!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's a chocolate from me, so it's special! You can
count that as equal to one hundred ordinary
chocolates! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Are they handmade?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nope! For hygiene purposes, it's an assortment of
store-bought chocolates! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But it comes with a special extra goodie that I'm
sure you'll all love! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's have fun today! I'm sure you all know
this first song! ☆

The Valentine's Day event gets off to a smooth
start...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And here's your chocolate! ☆ Thanks a lot for
coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! It comes with a photo!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
N-not just that, but it's a photo of Falco in a maid
costume! She really went all out!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: She's sooo adorable!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I took them specially for this event! ☆ They
seemed fitting for Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you all think? Am I adorbs?

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Super adorbs!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ☆ Feel free to post them on Umatter—and
I'd appreciate it if you would spread the word
about my races too! ♪
A short while later...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew! What a day!
choice_data_list: Looks like all the fans have gone home.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Then...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hold on! There's still one fan left!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Here! Chocolates for my very first fan!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's the same as everyone else's,
though! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... the photo that comes with yours might be
reeeally special! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆ You better frame it! ☆

Just as she said, there's an autographed photo of
Smart Falcon with a message attached inside.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"Happy Valentine's Day to my very first fan! ☆
Love, Falco."

The picture of her in the maid costume is also
covered with hand-drawn hearts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You're still here, Trainer! My very first fan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So here's yours!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's the same as everyone else's, but the extra gift
is a bit different.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: An Umadol's Valentine is all of her fans—that's what I've decided.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That means I can't go around giving out
chocolates with any kind of special meaning...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So instead, I prepared a medley just for you as a
way of saying thanks.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It'll be different from what I just sang in the mini
performance. I'm sure you'll love it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Will you accept this gift, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ♪ Then sit back, relax, and enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This is my special gift... only for you. ☆

Her voice sounds sweeter than usual as she sings
to me, making my Valentine's Day into a very
happy one.
